final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing travel brochure design for a 4-day Hangzhou itinerary, featuring a real Hangzhou map as the main visual thread.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, tri-fold brochure mockup with die-cut landmarks floating above textured card stock, editorial travel guide aesthetic
Composition: top-down flat lay of an open tri-fold brochure, each panel featuring a different day of the itinerary, famous scenic spots rendered as dimensional pop-up elements hovering 2-3mm above the paper surface
Subject: tri-fold travel guide brochure for "杭州市4天3晚" with real Hangzhou map as background, iconic landmarks (西湖/Xihu, 断桥残雪, 雷峰塔, 灵隐寺, 龙井村, 九溪烟树, 西溪湿地) as raised cut-out elements with distinct architectural features
Scene/backdrop: clean kraft paper or cream-colored card stock surface, subtle shadow beneath floating elements, minimal desk environment
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead light from upper left, gentle shadows under floating landmarks, warm inviting mood suggesting premium travel planning
Color palette: muted earth tones (kraft brown, cream) as base, vibrant green for tea fields and West Lake, warm terracotta for temples, clear blue for water features
Materials/textures: matte card stock with subtle fiber texture, glossy raised landmark cutouts with slight embossing, visible paper grain on map background
Text (verbatim): "杭州市4天3晚" / "第一天：西湖经典游" / "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径" / "第四天：文艺收官" / "运河文艺线" / "西溪湿地轻奢游"
Constraints: must clearly show three distinct folded panels; landmarks must be recognizable silhouettes; map must be geographically accurate Hangzhou layout; floating effect must be physically believable
Avoid: generic stock photo aesthetic; plastic-looking pop-ups; cluttered composition; illegible tiny text; mismatched landmark styles; cartoonish illustrations; watermarks
